name: neuraflash-assessment
description: Salesforce QA Automation Framework with OpenAI — NeuraFlash Assessment - Diego Valero

scripts.test:task1:full: rm -rf allure-results allure-report && playwright test tests/task1 --reporter=list,allure-playwright && npx allure-commandline generate allure-results --clean -o allure-report && npx allure-commandline open allure-report
scripts.test:task2:full: rm -rf allure-results allure-report && playwright test tests/task2 --reporter=list,allure-playwright && npx allure-commandline generate allure-results --clean -o allure-report && npx allure-commandline open allure-report
scripts.test:all:full: rm -rf allure-results allure-report && playwright test --reporter=list,allure-playwright && npx allure-commandline generate allure-results --clean -o allure-report && npx allure-commandline open allure-report
